zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabell Frome於大約1385年出生在英國多瑟特武德藍茲時，她的父親John Frome23歲，母親Margaret de Tregos27歲。她於1407年與Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missenden在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年9月4日享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Isabell Frome于大约1385年出生在英国多瑟特武德藍茲时，她的父亲John Frome23岁，母亲Margaret de Tregos27岁。她于1407年与Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missenden在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1442年9月4日享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾巴金哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Frome
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called, such as Frome (Somerset), Frome Saint Quintin, Frome Vauchurch, Frome Whitfield in Stinsford, the lost Frome Billet in West Stafford (all Dorset), Bishops Frome, Canon Frome, Castle Frome, and Prior's Frome and Larport (formerly Frome) both in Mordiford (all Herefordshire). Or a topographic name from the rivers on which these places are located, or simply a name for someone living beside a river of this name, which is probably cognate with Welsh ffraw ‘fair, fine, brisk’. Compare Frampton .

variants.name: Frampton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called, of which there are several in Gloucestershire, one in Dorset and one in Lincolnshire. Most take the name from the Frome river in south Gloucestershire (which is probably from a British word meaning ‘fair, brisk’) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. One near Tewkesbury was originally named in Old English as Frēolingtūn ‘settlement associated with Frēola’, a short form of any of various compound personal names with the first element frēo ‘free’. Frampton in Lincolnshire probably gets its name from an Old English byname Frameca (a derivative of fram ‘valiant’) + tūn.

variants.name: Froom
meanings: German: from a short form of a personal name composed with Middle High German vrom, vrum ‘valiant, steadfast’ (see Frommelt ).

nameMeanings.name: Isabell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabell Frome was born about 1385, in Woodlands, Dorset, England, her father, John Frome, was 23 and her mother, Margaret de Tregos, was 27. She married Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missenden in 1407, in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 4 September 1442, at the age of 58, and was buried in Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabell Frome est née environ 1385, à Woodlands, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Frome, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Tregos, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missenden en 1407, à Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 septembre 1442, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Fromeが約1385年にイギリスドールセトウッドランズで生まれた時，父John Fromeは23歳，母Margaret de Tregosは27歳であった。1407年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブクインガムでSir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missendenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年9月4日に58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブクインガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabell Frome(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 도르세트 우들랜드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Frome(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Tregos(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1407년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 벅잉함에서 Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missenden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 9월 4일 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 벅잉함에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missenden em 1407, em Buckingham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabell Frome родилась около 1385 г. в местности вудландс, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John Frome было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Tregos, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Bernard Missenden Lord of Missenden в 1407 г. в местности буккингхам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 сентября 1442 г. в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности буккингхам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
